---
title: "Learning Resources"
---

## Tutorials

Detailed step-by-step guides to help you learn the basics.

- [Keypoint Labeling](../examples/keypoint_labeling.qmd)
- [Using a Hidden Markov Model to Predict Behavioral Epochs with Deep Learning Features](tutorials/hmm_behavioral_epochs.qmd)
- [Is this neuron real? Following a signal between results and raw data](tutorials/is_this_neuron_real_tutorial.qmd)
- [Identifying Clusters in High Dimensional Data](tutorials/clustering_tutorial.qmd)

## How-to Guides

Practical guides to help you achieve specific tasks.

### Data Import

- [Video Import](../examples/video_import.qmd)
- [Image Stack Import](../examples/image_stack_import.qmd)
- [Load Tabular Binary Events](../examples/tabular_binary_events.qmd)

### Data Synthesizer



### Deep Learning

- [Exporting Pytorch Models for Neuralyzer](how-to/exporting_aoti_encoder.qmd)
- [Using NeuroSAM for Object Segmentation](how-to/neurosam_howto.qmd)

### Labeling

- [Keypoint Label Creation](../labeling/keypoint.qmd)
- [Mask Creation](../labeling/mask.qmd)

### Layout

TODO: Create layout and save and load

### Machine Learning

TODO: Random Forest Classification
TODO: Clustering

### Plotting

TODO: Flagging outliers with scatter plot widget
TODO: Sorting by internal and external features in raster plot widget
TODO: Exporting DataViewer to SVG


### Python Integration

TODO: Using conda environment for processing
TODO: 

### Triage & Curation

- [Triage Line Data](how-to/triage_line_data.qmd) — review predictions and move correct lines to ground truth
- [Label Video Intervals](how-to/label_video_intervals.qmd) — inspect scattered video regions and record what you reviewed

## Concepts

Deep dive into the core concepts and theory behind Neuralyzer.

- [TimeFrame](../concepts/timeframe.qmd)
